title: Most of our work starts with a recommendation.
lead: Around 60-70% of Green Wing's work comes through referrals. Operators, site teams and partners recommend us because the process is practical, evidence-led and focused on savings that can be verified.

intro.title: Trust is usually earned before the first meeting.
intro.body: Energy optimisation touches operations, budgets and long-term site decisions. A referral gives new clients confidence that Green Wing has already been trusted on real operating sites, has worked constructively with teams, and can turn findings into practical next steps.
items: Recommendations from operators, partners and site contacts drive the majority of our new conversations.
We keep advice independent, so a recommendation is based on suitability rather than supplier preference.
Every engagement is built around clear findings, ranked actions and a route to proving the savings.

placeholderTitle: Endorsements will appear here as clients approve them.
placeholderBody: We are collecting approved comments from clients, partners and site teams. Once permission is confirmed, this page can show short endorsements with names, roles and context.
